entities.name: WOMEN'S LABOR FORCE PARTICIPATION
entities.description: The involvement of rural women in paid or unpaid work activities.

entities.name: DIETARY DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of foods consumed by the household, serving as a measure of nutrition.

entities.name: HOME-PRODUCTION
entities.description: The production of goods for self-consumption within the household.

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD PANEL DATA
entities.description: Longitudinal data collected from the same households over time in the Semi-Arid tropics of India.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS OF INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region in India where the study was conducted.

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD FIXED EFFECTS MODEL
entities.description: A statistical estimation method used to control for time-invariant household characteristics.

entities.name: PAID WORK
entities.description: Labor force participation for which monetary wages are received.

entities.name: UNPAID WORK
entities.description: Labor force participation without monetary payment, often involving home-based production.

entities.name: DECISION-MAKING POWER
entities.description: The capacity of women to influence household choices and resource allocation.

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The overall dietary and health status of the household.

entities.name: BARGAINING POWER
entities.description: The relative power of women to negotiate outcomes and resources within the household.

entities.name: HEALTH INDICATORS
entities.description: Measures used to assess the physical health status of women.
